mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_lot_tracking WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_lot_tracking WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_lot_tracking WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_lot_tracking WHERE deleted = 0
AND (lot_number LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_lot_tracking ( lot_number, chemical_name, incoming_date, incoming_quantity, current_location, used_quantity, remaining_quantity, elapsed_days, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{lotNumber}, #{chemicalName}, #{incomingDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{incomingQuantity}, #{currentLocation}, #{usedQuantity}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{elapsedDays}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_lot_tracking SET lot_number = #{lotNumber}, chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, incoming_date = #{incomingDate,jdbcType=DATE}, incoming_quantity = #{incomingQuantity}, current_location = #{currentLocation}, used_quantity = #{usedQuantity}, remaining_quantity = #{remainingQuantity}, elapsed_days = #{elapsedDays}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_lot_tracking SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
